description: Bar-first MCP server for Tabula chart authoring, PNG rendering, and editor handoff.
name: click.tabula.www/tabula-mcp

headers.description: Optional Bearer token for authenticated Tabula users. Recommended source: https://www.tabula.click/docs/tabula-mcp/connect
headers.name: Authorization

headers.description: Optional guest session identifier to preserve guest quota state across remote requests.
headers.name: X-Tabula-Guest-Session

headers.description: Optional explicit approval signal for mutating tools when approval enforcement is enabled.
headers.name: X-Tabula-Approval

title: Tabula MCP
